name: 47"x24" Grassy Beach Dune Floated Paper Framed Under Plexiglass Wall Art - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Modern Lithograph
description:
Bring the minimal beauty of nature into your living space with the 47"x24" Grassy Beach Dune Floated Paper Framed Under Plexiglass from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This exquisite piece captures the essence of the outdoors, featuring a serene beach dune landscape presented in a lithograph medium. Its versatile beige frame blends right into your modern décor to add some neutral interest to your room. With a D-ring mount, it's super easy to hang on your wall anywhere you like.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
